headline: Workday Bets On Trusted AI Agents And AWS Data Ties To Reignite Growth
summary: Workday (NasdaqGS:WDAY) announced new AI and data features, including the Agent Passport security compliance platform for AI agents. The company introduced new agentic developer tools through the Workday Build platform. Workday Data Cloud is now fully integrated with Amazon Web Services, enabling bi directional data connections. Cisco is partnering with Workday to provide third party validation of AI agent security. For investors tracking NasdaqGS:WDAY, these product moves arrive after a...

headline: Announced at Kaltura Connect on the Road 2026: IBM, Accenture, McDonald’s, Bank of America, Vanguard, Cisco, and More Are Among the Winners of this Year’s Kaltura Digital Engagement Awards
summary: The annual awards recognize the inventive and impactful applications of Kaltura’s agentic digital experience platform driving innovation across enterprise digital experiences.New York, New York, June 15, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Kaltura (Nasdaq: KLTR), the Agentic Digital Experience company, today announced the recipients of the 2026 Kaltura Digital Engagement Awards. headline: Cisco (CSCO) Unveils Cloud Control Platform and Advances Private 5G Connectivity Solutions
summary: Cisco Systems Inc. (NASDAQ:CSCO) ranks among the best 5G stocks to buy right now. On June 2, Cisco Systems Inc. (NASDAQ:CSCO) announced the release of Cisco Cloud Control, a platform for managing IT infrastructure by operators and artificial intelligence agents.
